title: Indian firms lead global peers in AI adoption, but lag in expertise: Deloitte
description: Indian companies are adopting Artificial Intelligence on a large scale, surpassing global rivals. Most organisations plan to increase AI spending next year. This rapid deployment contrasts with a shortage of AI expertise. Despite challenges, Indian firms expect significant productivity gains from AI. The focus is shifting from experimentation to embedding AI for value creation and competitive advantage.
content:

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - India Leads the Charge in AI Adoption Despite Expertise Gap
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.
